message: Hi, I placed order #18472 last Friday and the tracking page has not updated. Can you tell me where it is?
Where is my package? It was supposed to be here yesterday and I have no update.
Can you check if my order shipped yet? I never got a tracking email.
I ordered the espresso machine two days ago. Is it still processing or did it leave the warehouse?
The tracking link says label created for three days. Has the carrier actually picked it up?
Just wondering when order 90331 will arrive. No rush, I just need to plan around delivery.
Could someone send me the tracking number for my sneaker order? I checked spam and do not see it.
Is there an estimated delivery date for the desk chair I bought on Monday?
My order still says awaiting fulfillment. Is that normal after 5 business days?
I need to know if my package will arrive before the 12th because I am leaving town.
The delivery estimate changed twice. What is the current status of order #AC7821?
Can you look up order 61109? The website just spins when I try to view tracking.
I bought a gift and want to see if it shipped. Please send the latest shipping status.
The carrier says it is in transit, but your site says processing. Which one is right?
I received part of my order, but the second item has no tracking. Is it shipping separately?
Do you know when the backordered lamp will ship? My confirmation email did not include a date.
Please update me on order #7712. It has been stuck on preparing to ship since last week.
I returned the jacket last week and still do not see my refund. When will the money be back on my card?
This blender is not what I expected. I want to send it back and get a refund.
Please cancel my order if it has not shipped and refund me.
The shoes are too small even though I used the size chart. How do I start a return?
My order arrived broken and I want my money back, not a replacement.
I was charged twice for the same order. Please refund the extra charge.
The headphones stopped working after one day. Can I return them for a refund?
I paid for express shipping, but it arrived late. I would like the shipping fee refunded.
I changed my mind about the patio set. It is still unopened and I want to return it.
The item description was misleading. I would like a full refund.
How long does it take to get refunded after you receive a return?
I sent back order 40218 using your label. Can you confirm the refund is being processed?
The coupon did not apply and I was charged full price. Can you refund the difference?
I do not want store credit. I need the refund back to my original payment method.
The package is missing two items, so I want a partial refund for what never arrived.
Please refund the warranty plan I added by mistake.
I refused delivery because the box was crushed. I need the order refunded.
Does this backpack fit a 16 inch laptop?
Is the dinnerware set microwave safe and dishwasher safe?
Will this phone case work with the iPhone 15 Pro or only the regular 15?
Do the curtains come as a pair or just one panel?
What is the weight limit for the adjustable standing desk?
Is the sweater true to size? I am between medium and large.
Can the water filter be used with the older Model B pitcher?
Before I order, can you tell me whether the sofa fabric is stain resistant?
Does the baby monitor require Wi-Fi, or can it work locally?
What are the dimensions of the large storage bins?
Is the leather on these boots genuine or synthetic?
Can I use this charger for both a laptop and a tablet?
Do you sell replacement lids that fit this travel mug?
Is the mattress firm, medium, or soft? The reviews are all over the place.
Does the grill include the propane hose in the box?
Are the earrings nickel free? I have a sensitivity.
I bought the lamp and it looks darker than expected. Is the walnut color supposed to vary?
My package arrived soaked and the box was falling apart. The items inside may be damaged.
The carrier says delivered, but there is nothing on my porch or with my neighbors.
You shipped my order to my old address even though I updated it before checkout.
Tracking says the package is lost in transit. What happens now?
I received someone else's order today. The label has my address but the items are wrong.
The box was crushed and the glass jars inside were shattered.
My delivery was marked as failed even though I was home all day.
The address on the shipping confirmation is missing my apartment number.
FedEx says they returned the package to sender. I did not request that.
Only one of the two boxes arrived, and the tracking for the other stopped updating.
My order arrived with the outer package open and one item missing.
The package was left in the rain even though delivery instructions said covered porch.
I paid for overnight shipping, but the carrier has not moved the package in 4 days.
The delivery photo shows a different building. That is not my front door.
The shipping label has the wrong ZIP code. Can you correct it before it goes out?
My item was delivered to a parcel locker, but I never received the access code.
The replacement order is also stuck with the carrier and now says exception.
I have contacted support three times and nobody has actually answered my question.
Your website made me reorder twice and then customer service blamed me. This has been awful.
I am really disappointed with the way this was handled. I expected better from your company.
The agent I chatted with was rude and ended the conversation before helping me.
This whole process is frustrating. Every update contradicts the last one.
I keep getting canned responses that do not address the issue.
The quality of service has gone downhill. I used to recommend this store, but not anymore.
I waited 40 minutes on hold and still got transferred to the wrong team.
Your return policy is confusing and the support article does not match what agents tell me.
I am tired of chasing this. Please escalate my case to a supervisor.
The product was fine, but the support experience was terrible.
Nobody seems to read the notes on my case. I have explained the same thing four times.
The checkout page promised one thing and the confirmation email said another. That feels misleading.
I am not asking another basic question. I want someone to take responsibility for this mess.
Your sale pricing changed right after I bought the item and support would not even discuss it.
This is my first order with you and honestly it has been a bad experience from start to finish.

The verification code keeps saying invalid even when I copy it directly from the email.
Please delete my customer account and personal information.
I can browse the site, but whenever I sign in it redirects me back to the login page.
My order history is blank even though I bought three items last month.
Someone may have used my account to place an order I do not recognize.
I need help changing my password before I make another purchase.
